title: Astro Advisor
subtitle: Is it a good day for...
contextPlaceholder: For example: important meeting with investor...

chat.headerSubtitle: A guided advisor session that feels like a conversation.
chat.intro: Choose a topic and I will guide you through the reading.
chat.topicHelp: Pick the life area you want me to evaluate first.
chat.datePrompt: Choose the date you want me to analyze.
chat.promptRequest: Now describe your situation or question. I will use it as context for the reading.
chat.promptPlaceholder: Write what you want advice about...

topicAcknowledgements.contract: Understood. I will focus on contracts, documents, and formal commitments.
topicAcknowledgements.meeting: Great. I will look at the energy around meetings and conversations.
topicAcknowledgements.negotiation: Noted. I will evaluate timing for negotiations and delicate discussions.
topicAcknowledgements.date: Understood. I will focus on romantic chemistry and emotional tone.
topicAcknowledgements.travel: Got it. I will look at how supportive the day is for travel and movement.
topicAcknowledgements.purchase: Understood. I will focus on purchases, risks, and practical timing.
topicAcknowledgements.health: Noted. I will look at the day through a health and wellbeing lens.
topicAcknowledgements.custom: Understood. I will give you a broader reading for this request.
